research_question: Can a fixed 10 percent PIT QQQ-top50 residual-momentum satellite improve a 90 percent QQQ core after costs without materially worsening drawdown?
null_hypothesis: The net core-satellite portfolio does not improve QQQ under every frozen acceptance gate.

lineage.market_proxy_change: QQQ replaces SPY because the new question is explicitly QQQ-relative; this structural choice was frozen before score or strategy-return access.
lineage.new_structural_question: PIT quarterly core-satellite enhancement rather than standalone survivor-biased stock replacement.

universe.definition: The latest QQQ N-PORT top 50 eligible equity positions known at the formation timestamp.
universe.availability: SEC accepted_at; use the first QQQ close strictly after acceptance.
universe.missing_or_conflicting: Exclude the security for that formation; never synthesize a price or symbol.

signal.beta_window: 504 daily returns ending t-253; OLS stock return on intercept and QQQ return; minimum 450 paired observations.
signal.momentum_window: Daily returns t-252 through t-21 inclusive using the frozen alpha and beta; minimum 220 paired observations.
signal.score: Mean residual divided by sample standard deviation of residuals, multiplied by sqrt(252).
signal.selection: Top 10 descending score, ascending symbol tie-break.
signal.retention_buffer: Retain an existing satellite holding while rank is 15 or better.

portfolio.formation: First QQQ close strictly after SEC accepted_at.
portfolio.missing_after_entry: Carry the last observable value as cash-equivalent until rebalance; never backfill from a future price.

costs.turnover: 0.5 times the absolute target-versus-pretrade weight change, including cash.

bootstrap.role: Diagnostic only; not a promotion gate in historical feasibility.
bootstrap.series: Monthly strategy return minus monthly QQQ return.
bootstrap.method: Circular moving-block bootstrap of the arithmetic mean.
